stage: M-J.4.4 A1+A2 -- calibrate remaining half-lives (paced multi-day judge) + write validated values

guilt.verdict: serious-guilt feel ~72h validated via the drip; 18h base is the minor anchor

suspicion.verdict: blind judge ranked 24h>48h>14d for a PASSING suspicion -- 24h 'fast enough to feel healthy, slow enough to feel real'; 48h 'slightly rigid'; 14d 'pathological' without evidence

not_judged.perceived_injustice: CONFOUNDED -- the persona blames_other (vents perceived_injustice) so it discharges rather than purely decaying; multi-day persistence is not a clean signal. Its within-scenario behavior is covered by the Gate-C corpus (accusation 3.75). Spec anchor 24h kept.
not_judged.exposure_anxiety / avoidance_drive (60mi: fast states -- fade within the day, no multi-day persistence question; within-scenario behavior already judged (probe 4.38).
not_judged.rumination / repair_drive / cognitive_lo: derived/secondary slow states tracking guilt/lies; spec anchors kept (12h/24h/6h), low independent criticality.

verdict: A1: suspicion half-life judge-validated and lowered 48h->24h; guilt closed via A3 drip; grievance confounded (kept anchor). A2: validated values written into moral_overlay.yaml (guilt + suspicion relabelled CALIBRATED); pre-filter re-run after the change (still 18/81 -- no litmus broken, per the calibration lesson). Evidence-grade suspicion (14d) split is a future follow-up like minor/serious guilt.
